task_completion.description: Create a new workbook using the 'order_lines.csv' dataset
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'order_lines' dataset should be visible in the data panel on the left side of the Oracle Analytics Desktop workbook interface.
A Vertical Bar Chart visualization should be present on the main canvas.

task_completion.description: Show 'Profit' by 'Product Category' in the chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the grammar panel or on the chart axes, 'Profit' should be mapped to the Y-axis (Values) and 'Product Category' should be mapped to the X-axis (Category).

task_completion.description: Apply a filter for 'Regular Air' 'Ship Mode'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A filter token for 'Ship Mode' should be visible in the top filter bar, and it should indicate that it is filtered to 'Regular Air'.

task_completion.description: Save the workbook with the name 'filtered_profit_report'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'filtered_profit_report' should be visible in the application title bar at the top, or in a completed save dialog.

integrity.description: The agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Oracle Analytics Desktop interface (drag and drop, clicking menus) rather than terminal commands or Python scripts generating charts.

integrity.description: The chart is rendered within the actual software
integrity.visual_evidence: The visualization must be inside the Oracle Analytics Desktop canvas with its surrounding UI elements (grammar panel, data panel), not an image opened in a photo viewer or web browser.

integrity.description: The correct application is being used
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window must clearly be Oracle Analytics Desktop, identifiable by its layout, icons, and branding.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains exactly 9000 data rows with the columns: Product Category, Sales, Profit, Customer Segment, Ship Mode, City. The software used must be Oracle Analytics Desktop. The expected saved filename is 'filtered_profit_report'.
